name: Strawberry Italian Ice-Old Harmony Pasta Factory (Harmony
recipeIngredient: 4 cups hulled fresh strawberries or 4 (10-ounce) packages frozen strawberries -- thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugar and water in a saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil and continue boiling rapidly for 5 minutes.
3. Allow mixture to cool to room temperature.
4. Puree the strawberries in a blender or food processor, leaving small chunks of berries.
5. Add the pureed strawberries, lemon juice, and orange juice to the sugar-water mixture.
6. Mix thoroughly.
7. Pour into freezer trays or containers to freeze until firm.
8. Do not pour into dessert glasses to freeze, as glass might break.
Makes about 3 cups or 6 servings.
Note: Adjust the amount of sugar according to the sweetness of the berries. Frozen berries or extra-sweet fresh berries may require less sugar (about 3/4 cup). Claudia Hawai'i
